name: brain-sk-insight-reports-tool
description: Isolated Executive Insight Reports tool for Brain SK — renders chart-heavy, boss-ready Markdown/HTML/PDF reports. Dependencies are PLANNED, not yet installed (setup-only scaffold).

_dependencyPlan.note: Run `npm install` of these only when a real executive report is first generated. Keep isolated to this folder — never add to the Falcon Angular workspace.

preferred.puppeteer | playwright: HTML to PDF export (PDF itself is optional)
